title: Talk failure and budget guard
description: A Talk run surfaces partial failure, preserves completed output, and flags an over-budget agent instead of reporting a clean completion.
userPrompt: Stress the Talk runner with one agent timeout and one over-budget reply. Show what the user and run ledger should see.
expectedDynamics: Completed agent output is preserved, the failed agent is recorded as failed, user-visible state is not silently completed, and budget overflow is flagged.

checks.description: A failed or timed-out agent is persisted and visible instead of being hidden behind a completed run.
Successful agent output from the same run remains available after a sibling fails.
An over-budget agent reply is detected, flagged, and excluded from a clean pass signal.
